description_long: This chair features a curved, wraparound backrest and seat upholstered in a muted olive-green fabric with a subtle plaid pattern. The backrest and seat are supported by a wooden frame with a warm, reddish-brown finish, giving the chair a mid-century modern aesthetic. The chair has four slender, tapered wooden legs that provide stability and elegance. The seat cushion is slightly raised and appears well-padded for comfort. The backrest curves outward at the ends, offering partial arm support and a distinctive silhouette. Visible fasteners on the side panels add a touch of industrial detail to the overall refined design.
description: A mid-century modern chair with a curved olive-green plaid backrest and seat, supported by a reddish-brown wooden frame and four tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved backrest, padded seat, and the open space between the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's curved backrest, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the visible fasteners on the wooden side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the elegant taper of the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curvature of the backrest and the side panel details, mirroring view 1.
